title: sonchus tenerrimus subsp. perennis
intro: Sonchus tenerrimus subsp. perennis, also known as the perennial sow thistle, is a plant species in the dandelion family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sonchus tenerrimus subsp. perennis include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and act as an antiseptic, making it a useful remedy for various health issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
